module_info.docstring:
Tests for the interrupt system.

Run with: python -m pytest tests/test_interrupt.py -v

methods.name: test_thread_safety
methods.docstring: Set from one thread, check from another.

classes.name: TestPreToolCheck
classes.docstring: Verify that _execute_tool_calls skips all tools when interrupted.

methods.name: test_all_tools_skipped_when_interrupted
methods.docstring: Mock an interrupted agent and verify no tools execute.

classes.name: TestMessageCombining
classes.docstring: Verify multiple interrupt messages are joined.

methods.name: test_cli_interrupt_queue_drain
methods.docstring: Simulate draining multiple messages from the interrupt queue.

classes.name: TestSIGKILLEscalation
classes.docstring: Test that SIGTERM-resistant processes get SIGKILL'd.

methods.name: test_sigterm_trap_killed_within_2s
methods.docstring: A process that traps SIGTERM should be SIGKILL'd after 1s grace.
